title: Add attribution schema + JSONL writer for per-trade audit records
objective: Extend the trades DB schema and add a dedicated attribution module + JSONL writer so every paper trade can produce a complete audit record. This is the foundation for downstream wiring, dashboard, and replay tasks.
forbidden_actions: Modify bot_core.py or core/paper_exec.py (that is TRADE_ATTRIBUTION_WIRING_001)
Drop or rename existing DB columns
required_work: 1. Add attribution columns to trades table via idempotent ALTER TABLE migration.
2. Create core/attribution.py with TradeAttribution dataclass, classify_trade() and JSONL writer.
4. Migration must be safe to rerun without effect.
acceptance_criteria: All columns listed in handoff are present after migration
Second run of migration is a no-op (idempotent)
classify_trade correctly maps all 5 enum values given test inputs
No existing trades data is lost or corrupted
verification: Run bot_core startup migration twice — confirm second run adds no columns
Show one synthesized TradeAttribution record written to runtime/trade_attribution.jsonl
